name: LIGHTBRIDGE Corp
summary: Lightbridge Corporation (LTBR) is a nuclear fuel technology company developing advanced metallic nuclear fuel, known as Lightbridge Fuel, for use in nuclear reactors. The company focuses on research, development, and commercialization of its proprietary fuel technology, conducting work in partnership with the U.S. government and national laboratories. Lightbridge Fuel is designed as an accident tolerant fuel (ATF) alternative aimed at improving reactor performance and safety.

products.name: Lightbridge Fuel
products.description: Proprietary advanced metallic nuclear fuel technology designed for use in nuclear reactors, positioned as an accident tolerant fuel (ATF).

partnerships.description: Collaborative relationship for research, development, and testing of Lightbridge nuclear fuel technology.
